title: aristolochia rotunda subsp. reichsteinii
intro: Aristolochia rotunda subsp. reichsteinii, also known as a type of Dutchman's pipe or pipevine, is a species of flowering plant within the Aristolochiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of aristolochic acid. The health benefits associated with Aristolochia rotunda subsp. reichsteinii include potential treatments for various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of infusions, tinctures, and ointments, but it is essential to use them under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity and side effects.
